writing.title: Writing Task 2: Imagine a different life
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) imagining a different situation, using Conditional 2 (If + Past Simple, would).
writing.sampleAnswer: If I had a lot of money, I would travel around the world. If I were a leader, I would invest more in education. If only we had more time to discuss this.
checklist: Dùng If + Past Simple đúng dạng
Dùng would + V trong mệnh đề kết quả
Tình huống mang tính giả định, không có thật

writing.title: Writing Task 2: Real vs hypothetical situations
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) comparing a realistic situation and a hypothetical one, combining Conditional 1 and Conditional 2.
writing.sampleAnswer: If it rains tomorrow, the match will be cancelled. That is realistic. If I won the lottery, I would buy a big house, but that is just a dream.
checklist: Có 1 câu điều kiện loại 1 (thực tế)
Có 1 câu điều kiện loại 2 (giả định)
Phân biệt rõ hai loại trong câu văn
